params.label: Advanced Lateral Tuning
params.description: Advanced steering control changes to fine-tune how openpilot drives.

params.label: Actuator Delay
params.description: Actuator Delay

params.label: Friction
params.description: Friction

params.label: Kp Factor
params.description: Kp Factor

params.label: Ki Factor (Default: 0.30)
params.description: Integral gain - how quickly openpilot corrects persistent lane offset. Higher values correct offset faster but may cause overshoot after turns. Lower values give cleaner turn unwind but slower offset correction.

params.label: Lat Smooth Seconds (Default: 0.10)
params.description: Smoothing time for lateral curvature changes. Lower values make steering more responsive but potentially jerkier. Higher values are smoother but may feel sluggish. Set to 0 for no smoothing.

params.label: Lateral Acceleration
params.description: Lateral Acceleration

params.label: Steer Ratio
params.description: Steer Ratio

params.label: Force Auto-Tune On
params.description: Force-enable openpilot's live auto-tuning for "Friction" and "Lateral Acceleration".

params.label: Force Auto-Tune Off
params.description: Force-disable openpilot's live auto-tuning for "Friction" and "Lateral Acceleration" and use the set value instead.

params.label: Force Torque Controller
params.description: Use torque-based steering control instead of angle-based control for smoother lane keeping, especially in curves.

params.label: Advanced Turn Desires
params.description: Improve low-speed turn performance with curvature bias and faster steering response. Enables tighter, more responsive turns when the blinker is active at low speeds.

params.label: Turn Lateral Smoothing
params.description: Lateral smoothing time during turns. Lower values make steering more responsive during turns. Default: 0.05s

params.label: Left Turn Bias
params.description: Percentage of inward curvature bias for left turns. Negative values pull the path inward. Default: -2%

params.label: Right Turn Bias
params.description: Percentage of inward curvature bias for right turns. Positive values pull the path inward. Default: 4%

params.label: Post-Turn Smoothing Time
params.description: How long to maintain fast steering response after a turn completes. Helps with smooth steering wheel unwind. Default: 2 seconds

params.label: Always On Lateral
params.description: openpilot's steering remains active even when the accelerator or brake pedals are pressed.

params.label: Enable With LKAS
params.description: Enable "Always On Lateral" whenever "LKAS" is on, even when openpilot is not engaged.

params.label: Pause on Brake Press Below
params.description: Pause "Always On Lateral" below the set speed while the brake pedal is pressed.

params.label: Lane Changes
params.description: Allow openpilot to change lanes.

params.label: Automatic Lane Changes
params.description: When the turn signal is on, openpilot will automatically change lanes. No steering-wheel nudge required!

params.label: Lane Change Delay
params.description: Delay between turn signal activation and the start of an automatic lane change.

params.label: Minimum Lane Change Speed
params.description: Lowest speed at which openpilot will change lanes.

params.label: Minimum Lane Width
params.description: Prevent automatic lane changes into lanes narrower than the set width.

params.label: One Lane Change Per Signal
params.description: Limit automatic lane changes to one per turn-signal activation.

params.label: Lane Change Duration
params.description: How long the lane change maneuver takes. Lower values extend the duration, giving the car more time to complete the lane change. Higher values are faster.

params.label: Lane Change Jerk Response
params.description: How quickly steering changes during lane changes. Lower values make the initial turn-in smoother and more gradual. Higher values are more responsive.

params.label: Lane Change Lateral Accel
params.description: How fast you move sideways during lane changes. Lower values make lane changes take longer. Higher values complete lane changes faster.

params.label: Lateral Tuning
params.description: Miscellaneous steering control changes to fine-tune how openpilot drives.

params.label: Lane Position Offset (Default: 0.00)
params.description: Shift the car's lane position left or right. Positive values shift right, negative values shift left. If your car hugs the left side, use a positive value to center it.

params.label: Force Turn Desires Below Lane Change Speed
params.description: While driving below the minimum lane change speed with an active turn signal, instruct openpilot to turn left/right.

params.label: Neural Network Feedforward (NNFF)
params.description: Twilsonco's "Neural Network FeedForward" controller. Uses a trained neural network model to predict steering torque based on vehicle speed, roll, and past/future planned path data for smoother, model-based steering.

params.label: Neural Network Feedforward (NNFF) Lite
params.description: A lightweight version of Twilsonco's "Neural Network FeedForward" controller. Uses the "look-ahead" planned lateral jerk logic from the full model to help smoothen steering adjustments in curves, but does not use the full neural network for torque calculation.

params.label: Quality of Life
params.description: Steering control changes to fine-tune how openpilot drives.

params.label: Pause Steering Below
params.description: Pause steering below the set speed.

params.label: Advanced Longitudinal Tuning
params.description: Advanced acceleration and braking control changes to fine-tune how openpilot drives.

params.label: Actuator Delay
params.description: Actuator Delay

params.label: Maximum Acceleration
params.description: Limit the strongest acceleration openpilot can command.

params.label: Start Acceleration
params.description: Start Acceleration

params.label: Start Speed
params.description: Start Speed

params.label: Stop Acceleration
params.description: Stop Acceleration

params.label: Stopping Rate
params.description: Stopping Rate

params.label: Stop Speed
params.description: Stop Speed

params.label: Conditional Experimental Mode
params.description: Automatically switch to "Experimental Mode" when set conditions are met. Allows the model to handle challenging situations with smarter decision making.

params.label: Below
params.description: Switch to "Experimental Mode" when driving below this speed without a lead to help openpilot handle low-speed situations more smoothly.

params.label: Below (With Lead)
params.description: Switch to "Experimental Mode" when driving below this speed with a lead.

params.label: Curve Detected Ahead
params.description: Switch to "Experimental Mode" when a curve is detected to allow the model to set an appropriate speed for the curve.

params.label: \"Detected\" Stop Lights/Signs
params.description:
Switch to "Experimental Mode" whenever the driving model "detects" a red light or stop sign.

Disclaimer: openpilot does not explicitly detect traffic lights or stop signs. In "Experimental Mode", openpilot makes end-to-end driving decisions from camera input, which means it may stop even when there's no clear reason!

params.label: Lead Detected Ahead
params.description: Switch to "Experimental Mode" when a slower or stopped vehicle is detected. Can make braking smoother and more reliable on some vehicles.

params.label: Slower Lead
params.description: Switch to "Experimental Mode" when a slower lead vehicle is detected ahead.

params.label: Stopped Lead
params.description: Switch to "Experimental Mode" when a stopped lead vehicle is detected ahead.

params.label: Predicted Stop In
params.description:
Switch to "Experimental Mode" when openpilot predicts a stop within the set time. This is usually triggered when the model "sees" a red light or stop sign ahead.

Disclaimer: openpilot does not explicitly detect traffic lights or stop signs. In "Experimental Mode", openpilot makes end-to-end driving decisions from camera input, which means it may stop even when there's no clear reason!

params.label: Turn Signal Below
params.description: Switch to "Experimental Mode" when using a turn signal below the set speed to allow the model to choose an appropriate speed for smoother left and right turns.

params.label: Status Widget
params.description: Show which condition triggered "Experimental Mode" on the driving screen.

params.label: Curve Speed Controller
params.description: Automatically slow down for upcoming curves using data learned from your driving style, adapting to curves as you would.

params.label: Status Widget
params.description: Show the "Curve Speed Controller" target speed on the driving screen.

params.label: Driving Personalities
params.description: Customize the "Driving Personalities" to better match your driving style.

params.label: Following Distance
params.description: The minimum following distance to the lead vehicle in "Traffic Mode". openpilot blends between this value and the "Aggressive" profile as speed increases. Increase for more space; decrease for tighter gaps.

params.label: Acceleration Smoothness
params.description: How smoothly openpilot accelerates in "Traffic Mode". Increase for gentler starts; decrease for faster but more abrupt takeoffs.

params.label: Braking Smoothness
params.description: How smoothly openpilot brakes in "Traffic Mode". Increase for gentler stops; decrease for quicker but sharper braking.

params.label: Safety Gap Bias
params.description: How much extra space openpilot keeps from the vehicle ahead in "Traffic Mode". Increase for larger gaps and more cautious following; decrease for tighter gaps and closer following.

params.label: Slowdown Response
params.description: How smoothly openpilot slows down in "Traffic Mode". Increase for more gradual deceleration; decrease for faster but sharper slowdowns.

params.label: Speed-Up Response
params.description: How smoothly openpilot speeds up in "Traffic Mode". Increase for more gradual acceleration; decrease for quicker but more jolting acceleration.

params.label: Following Distance
params.description:
How many seconds openpilot follows behind lead vehicles when using the "Aggressive" profile. Increase for more space; decrease for tighter gaps.

Default: 1.25 seconds.

params.label: Acceleration Smoothness
params.description: How smoothly openpilot accelerates with the "Aggressive" profile. Increase for gentler starts; decrease for faster but more abrupt takeoffs.

params.label: Braking Smoothness
params.description: How smoothly openpilot brakes with the "Aggressive" profile. Increase for gentler stops; decrease for quicker but sharper braking.

params.label: Safety Gap Bias
params.description: How much extra space openpilot keeps from the vehicle ahead with the "Aggressive" profile. Increase for larger gaps and more cautious following; decrease for tighter gaps and closer following.

params.label: Slowdown Response
params.description: How smoothly openpilot slows down with the "Aggressive" profile. Increase for more gradual deceleration; decrease for faster but sharper slowdowns.

params.label: Speed-Up Response
params.description: How smoothly openpilot speeds up with the "Aggressive" profile. Increase for more gradual acceleration; decrease for quicker but more jolting acceleration.

params.label: Following Distance
params.description:
How many seconds openpilot follows behind lead vehicles when using the "Standard" profile. Increase for more space; decrease for tighter gaps.

Default: 1.45 seconds.

params.label: Acceleration Smoothness
params.description: How smoothly openpilot accelerates with the "Standard" profile. Increase for gentler starts; decrease for faster but more abrupt takeoffs.

params.label: Braking Smoothness
params.description: How smoothly openpilot brakes with the "Standard" profile. Increase for gentler stops; decrease for quicker but sharper braking.

params.label: Safety Gap Bias
params.description: How much extra space openpilot keeps from the vehicle ahead with the "Standard" profile. Increase for larger gaps and more cautious following; decrease for tighter gaps and closer following.

params.label: Slowdown Response
params.description: How smoothly openpilot slows down with the "Standard" profile. Increase for more gradual deceleration; decrease for faster but sharper slowdowns.

params.label: Speed-Up Response
params.description: How smoothly openpilot speeds up with the "Standard" profile. Increase for more gradual acceleration; decrease for quicker but more jolting acceleration.

params.label: Following Distance
params.description:
How many seconds openpilot follows behind lead vehicles when using the "Relaxed" profile. Increase for more space; decrease for tighter gaps.

Default: 1.75 seconds.

params.label: Acceleration Smoothness
params.description: How smoothly openpilot accelerates with the "Relaxed" profile. Increase for gentler starts; decrease for faster but more abrupt takeoffs.

params.label: Braking Smoothness
params.description: How smoothly openpilot brakes with the "Relaxed" profile. Increase for gentler stops; decrease for quicker but sharper braking.

params.label: Safety Gap Bias
params.description: How much extra space openpilot keeps from the vehicle ahead with the "Relaxed" profile. Increase for larger gaps and more cautious following; decrease for tighter gaps and closer following.

params.label: Slowdown Response
params.description: How smoothly openpilot slows down with the "Relaxed" profile. Increase for more gradual deceleration; decrease for faster but sharper slowdowns.

params.label: Speed-Up Response
params.description: How smoothly openpilot speeds up with the "Relaxed" profile. Increase for more gradual acceleration; decrease for quicker but more jolting acceleration.

params.label: Longitudinal Tuning
params.description: Acceleration and braking control changes to fine-tune how openpilot drives.

params.label: Human-Like Acceleration
params.description: Acceleration that mimics human behavior by easing the throttle at low speeds and adding extra power when taking off from a stop.

params.label: Human-Like Following
params.description: Following behavior that mimics human drivers by closing gaps behind faster vehicles for quicker takeoffs and dynamically adjusting the desired following distance for gentler, more efficient braking.

params.label: Human-Like Lane Changes
params.description: Lane-change behavior that mimics human drivers by anticipating and tracking adjacent vehicles during lane changes.

params.label: Lead Detection Sensitivity
params.description: How sensitive openpilot is to detecting vehicles. Higher sensitivity allows quicker detection at longer distances but may react to non-vehicle objects; lower sensitivity is more conservative and reduces false detections.

params.label: \"Taco Bell Run\" Turn Speed Hack
params.description: The turn-speed hack from comma's 2022 "Taco Bell Run". Designed to slow down for left and right turns.

params.label: Quality of Life
params.description: Miscellaneous acceleration and braking control changes to fine-tune how openpilot drives.

params.label: Cruise Interval
params.description: How much the set speed increases or decreases for each + or – cruise control button press.

params.label: Cruise Interval (Hold)
params.description: How much the set speed increases or decreases while holding the + or – cruise control buttons.

params.label: Force Stop at \"Detected\" Stop Lights/Signs
params.description:
Force openpilot to stop whenever the driving model "detects" a red light or stop sign.

Disclaimer: openpilot does not explicitly detect traffic lights or stop signs. In "Experimental Mode", openpilot makes end-to-end driving decisions from camera input, which means it may stop even when there's no clear reason!

params.label: Intelligent Cruise Button Management
params.description: Automatically adjust the car's cruise control set speed to match FrogPilot's target speed by simulating button presses. Useful for Curve Speed Control and Speed Limit Controller when openpilot longitudinal is unavailable.

params.label: Increase Stopped Distance by:
params.description: Add extra space when stopped behind vehicles. Increase for more room; decrease for shorter gaps.

params.label: Map Accel/Decel to Gears
params.description: Map the Acceleration or Deceleration profiles to the vehicle's "Eco" and "Sport" gear modes.

params.label: Offset Set Speed by:
params.description: Increase the set speed by the chosen offset. For example, set +5 if you usually drive 5 over the limit.

params.label: Reverse Cruise Increase
params.description: Reverse the cruise control button behavior so a short press increases the set speed by 5 instead of 1.

params.label: Weather Condition Offsets
params.description: Automatically adjust driving behavior based on real-time weather. Helps maintain comfort and safety in low visibility, rain, or snow.

params.label: Increase Following Distance by:
params.description: Add extra space behind lead vehicles in low visibility. Increase for more space; decrease for tighter gaps.

params.label: Increase Stopped Distance by:
params.description: Add extra buffer when stopped behind vehicles in low visibility. Increase for more room; decrease for shorter gaps.

params.label: Reduce Acceleration by:
params.description: Lower the maximum acceleration in low visibility. Increase for softer takeoffs; decrease for quicker but less stable takeoffs.

params.label: Reduce Speed in Curves by:
params.description: Lower the desired speed while driving through curves in low visibility. Increase for safer, gentler turns; decrease for more aggressive driving in curves.

params.label: Increase Following Distance by:
params.description: Add extra space behind lead vehicles in rain. Increase for more space; decrease for tighter gaps.

params.label: Increase Stopped Distance by:
params.description: Add extra buffer when stopped behind vehicles in rain. Increase for more room; decrease for shorter gaps.

params.label: Reduce Acceleration by:
params.description: Lower the maximum acceleration in rain. Increase for softer takeoffs; decrease for quicker but less stable takeoffs.

params.label: Reduce Speed in Curves by:
params.description: Lower the desired speed while driving through curves in rain. Increase for safer, gentler turns; decrease for more aggressive driving in curves.

params.label: Increase Following Distance by:
params.description: Add extra space behind lead vehicles in a rainstorm. Increase for more space; decrease for tighter gaps.

params.label: Increase Stopped Distance by:
params.description: Add extra buffer when stopped behind vehicles in a rainstorm. Increase for more room; decrease for shorter gaps.

params.label: Reduce Acceleration by:
params.description: Lower the maximum acceleration in a rainstorm. Increase for softer takeoffs; decrease for quicker but less stable takeoffs.

params.label: Reduce Speed in Curves by:
params.description: Lower the desired speed while driving through curves in a rainstorm. Increase for safer, gentler turns; decrease for more aggressive driving in curves.

params.label: Increase Following Distance by:
params.description: Add extra space behind lead vehicles in snow. Increase for more space; decrease for tighter gaps.

params.label: Increase Stopped Distance by:
params.description: Add extra buffer when stopped behind vehicles in snow. Increase for more room; decrease for shorter gaps.

params.label: Reduce Acceleration by:
params.description: Lower the maximum acceleration in snow. Increase for softer takeoffs; decrease for quicker but less stable takeoffs.

params.label: Reduce Speed in Curves by:
params.description: Lower the desired speed while driving through curves in snow. Increase for safer, gentler turns; decrease for more aggressive driving in curves.

params.label: Speed Limit Controller
params.description: Limit openpilot's maximum driving speed to the current speed limit obtained from downloaded maps, Mapbox, or the dashboard for supported vehicles (Ford, Genesis, Hyundai, Kia, Lexus, Toyota).

params.label: Confirm New Speed Limits
params.description: Ask before changing to a new speed limit. To accept, tap the flashing on-screen widget or press the Cruise Increase button. To deny, press the Cruise Decrease button or ignore the prompt for 30 seconds.

params.label: Higher Limit Lookahead Time
params.description: How far ahead openpilot anticipates upcoming higher speed limits from downloaded map data.

params.label: Lower Limit Lookahead Time
params.description: How far ahead openpilot anticipates upcoming lower speed limits from downloaded map data.

params.label: Match Speed Limit on Engage
params.description: When openpilot is first enabled, automatically set the max speed to the current posted limit.

params.label: Use Mapbox as Fallback
params.description: Use Mapbox speed-limit data when no other source is available.

params.label: Speed Offset (0–24 mph)
params.description: How much to offset posted speed-limits between 0 and 24 mph.

params.label: Speed Offset (25–34 mph)
params.description: How much to offset posted speed-limits between 25 and 34 mph.

params.label: Speed Offset (35–44 mph)
params.description: How much to offset posted speed-limits between 35 and 44 mph.

params.label: Speed Offset (45–54 mph)
params.description: How much to offset posted speed-limits between 45 and 54 mph.

params.label: Speed Offset (55–64 mph)
params.description: How much to offset posted speed-limits between 55 and 64 mph.

params.label: Speed Offset (65–74 mph)
params.description: How much to offset posted speed-limits between 65 and 74 mph.

params.label: Speed Offset (75–99 mph)
params.description: How much to offset posted speed-limits between 75 and 99 mph.

params.label: Show Speed Limit Offset
params.description: Show the current offset from the posted limit on the driving screen.

params.label: Show Speed Limit Sources
params.description: Display the speed-limit sources and their current values on the driving screen.

params.label: Show Active Source Only
params.description: Show only the active speed limit source instead of all available sources.

params.label: Advanced UI Controls
params.description: Advanced visual changes to fine-tune how the driving screen looks.

params.label: Hide Current Speed
params.description: Hide the current speed from the driving screen.

params.label: Hide Lead Marker
params.description: Hide the lead-vehicle marker from the driving screen.

params.label: Hide Max Speed
params.description: Hide the max speed from the driving screen.

params.label: Hide Non-Critical Alerts
params.description: Hide non-critical alerts from the driving screen.

params.label: Hide Driver Monitoring Icon
params.description: Hide the driver monitoring icon from the driving screen.

params.label: Hide Speed Limits
params.description: Hide posted speed limits from the driving screen.

params.label: Use Wheel Speed
params.description: Use the vehicle's wheel speed instead of the cluster speed. This is purely a visual change and doesn't impact how openpilot drives!

params.label: Driving Screen Widgets
params.description: Custom FrogPilot widgets for the driving screen.

params.label: Acceleration Path
params.description: Color the driving path by planned acceleration and braking.

params.label: Adjacent Lanes
params.description: Show the driving paths for the left and right lanes.

params.label: Blind Spot Path
params.description: Show a red path when a vehicle is in that lane's blind spot.

params.label: Compass
params.description: Show the current driving direction with a simple on-screen compass.

params.label: Driving Personality Button
params.description: Control and view the current driving personality via a driving screen widget.

params.label: Gas / Brake Pedal Indicators
params.description:
On-screen gas and brake indicators.

Dynamic: Opacity changes according to how much openpilot is accelerating or braking
Static: Full when active, dim when not

params.label: Rotating Steering Wheel
params.description: Rotate the driving screen wheel with the physical steering wheel.

params.label: Model UI
params.description: Model visualizations for the driving path, lane lines, path edges, and road edges.

params.label: Dynamic Path Width
params.description:
Change the path width based on engagement.

Fully Engaged: 100%
Always On Lateral: 75%
Disengaged: 50%

params.label: Lane Lines Width
params.description:
Set the lane-line thickness.

Default matches the MUTCD lane-line width standard of 4 inches.

params.label: Path Edges Width
params.description:
Set the driving-path edge width that represents different driving modes and statuses.

Default is 20% of the total path width.

Color Guide:

- Light Blue: Always On Lateral
- Green: Default
- Orange: Experimental Mode
- Red: Traffic Mode
- Yellow: Conditional Experimental Mode overridden

params.label: Path Width
params.description:
Set the driving-path width.

Default (6.1 feet) matches the width of a 2019 Lexus ES 350.

params.label: Road Edges Width
params.description:
Set the road-edge thickness.

Default matches half of the MUTCD lane-line width standard of 4 inches.

params.label: Navigation Widgets
params.description: Speed limits, and other navigation widgets.

params.label: Road Name
params.description: Display the road name at the bottom of the driving screen using data from "OpenStreetMap (OSM)".

params.label: Show Speed Limits
params.description: Show speed limits in the top-left corner of the driving screen. Uses data from the car's dashboard (if supported) and "OpenStreetMap (OSM)".

params.label: Show Speed Limits from Mapbox
params.description: Use Mapbox speed-limit data when no other source is available.

params.label: Use Vienna-Style Speed Signs
params.description: Show Vienna-style (EU) speed-limit signs instead of MUTCD (US).

params.label: Quality of Life
params.description: Miscellaneous visual changes to fine-tune how the driving screen looks.

params.label: Show Driver Camera When In Reverse
params.description: Show the driver camera feed when the vehicle is in reverse.

params.label: Stopped Timer
params.description: Show a timer when stopped in place of the current speed to indicate how long the vehicle has been stopped.

params.label: Alert Volume Controller
params.description: Set how loud each type of openpilot alert is to keep routine prompts from becoming distracting.

params.label: Disengage Volume
params.description:
Set the volume for alerts when openpilot disengages.

Examples include: "Cruise Fault: Restart the Car", "Parking Brake Engaged", "Pedal Pressed".

params.label: Engage Volume
params.description: Set the volume for the chime when openpilot engages, such as after pressing the "RESUME" or "SET" steering wheel buttons.

params.label: Prompt Volume
params.description:
Set the volume for prompts that need attention.

Examples include: "Car Detected in Blindspot", "Steering Temporarily Unavailable", "Turn Exceeds Steering Limit".

params.label: Prompt Distracted Volume
params.description:
Set the volume for prompts when openpilot detects driver distraction or unresponsiveness.

Examples include: "Pay Attention", "Touch Steering Wheel".

params.label: Refuse Volume
params.description:
Set the volume for alerts when openpilot refuses to engage.

Examples include: "Brake Hold Active", "Door Open", "Seatbelt Unlatched".

params.label: Warning Soft Volume
params.description:
Set the volume for softer warnings about potential risks.

Examples include: "BRAKE! Risk of Collision", "Steering Temporarily Unavailable".

params.label: Warning Immediate Volume
params.description:
Set the volume for the loudest warnings that require urgent attention.

Examples include: "DISENGAGE IMMEDIATELY — Driver Distracted", "DISENGAGE IMMEDIATELY — Driver Unresponsive".

params.label: FrogPilot Alerts
params.description: Optional FrogPilot alerts that highlight driving events in a more noticeable way.

params.label: Goat Scream
params.description: Play the infamous "Goat Scream" when the steering controller reaches its limit. Based on the "Turn Exceeds Steering Limit" event.

params.label: Green Light Alert
params.description:
Play an alert when the model predicts a red light has turned green.

Disclaimer: openpilot does not explicitly detect traffic lights. This alert is based on end-to-end model predictions from camera input and may trigger even when the light has not changed.

params.label: Lead Departing Alert
params.description: Play an alert when the lead vehicle departs from a stop.

params.label: Loud \"Car Detected in Blindspot\" Alert
params.description: Play a louder alert if a vehicle is in the blind spot when attempting to change lanes. Based on the "Car Detected in Blindspot" event.

params.label: Speed Limit Changed Alert
params.description: Play an alert when the posted speed limit changes.

params.label: Stop-and-Go Hack
params.description: Force stop-and-go on the 2017 Chevy Volt.

params.label: \"Taco Bell Run\" Torque Hack
params.description: The steering torque hack from comma's 2022 "Taco Bell Run". Designed to increase steering torque at low speeds for left and right turns.

params.label: Stop and Go
params.description: Stop and go for supported Subaru vehicles.

params.label: Dashboard Speed Offset
params.description: The speed offset openpilot uses to match the speed on the dashboard display.

params.label: Stop-and-Go Hack
params.description: Force stop-and-go on Lexus/Toyota vehicles without stock stop-and-go functionality.

params.label: Device Settings
params.description: Settings that control how the device runs, powers off, and manages driving data.

params.label: Device Shutdown Timer
params.description: Keep the device on for the set amount of time after a drive before it shuts down automatically.

params.label: Disable Logging
params.description:
WARNING: This will prevent your drives from being recorded and all data will be unobtainable!

Prevent the device from saving driving data.

params.label: Disable Uploads
params.description:
WARNING: This will prevent your drives from being uploaded to comma connect which will impact debugging and official support from comma!

Prevent the device from uploading driving data.

params.label: High-Quality Recording
params.description: Save drive footage in higher video quality.

params.label: Low-Voltage Cutoff
params.description: While parked, if the battery voltage falls below the set level, the device shuts down to prevent excessive battery drain.

params.label: Raise Temperature Limits
params.description:
WARNING: Running at higher temperatures may damage your device!

Allow the device to run at higher temperatures before throttling or shutting down. Use only if you understand the risks!

params.label: Use Konik Server
params.description: Upload driving data to "stable.konik.ai" instead of "connect.comma.ai".

params.label: Screen Settings
params.description: Settings that control screen brightness, screen recording, and timeout duration.

params.label: Screen Brightness (Offroad)
params.description: The screen brightness while not driving.

params.label: Screen Brightness (Onroad)
params.description: The screen brightness while driving.

params.label: Screen Recorder
params.description: Add a button to the driving screen to record the display.

params.label: Screen Timeout (Offroad)
params.description: How long the screen stays on after being tapped while not driving.

params.label: Screen Timeout (Onroad)
params.description: How long the screen stays on after being tapped while driving.

params.label: Standby Mode
params.description: Turn the screen off while driving and automatically wake it up for alerts or engagement state changes.

params.label: Automatically Download New Models
params.description: Automatically download new driving models as they become available.

params.label: Model Randomizer
params.description: Driving models are chosen at random each drive and feedback prompts are used to find the model that best suits your needs.

params.label: Select Driving Model
params.description: Select the active driving model.
